subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He in Whose hands rests the dominion of the kingdoms of heaven and earth, and within Whose grasp lies the power of command and creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی بیده ملکوت ملک السموات و الارضین و فی قبضته جبروت الامر و الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
